series.age_note: Recommended 6+ - Fantasy adventure with dragons, mild action scenes and Vikings
series.curator_notes: This series spans 4 Spotify artists representing different TV show arcs: 'Die Reiter von Berk' (eps 1-10), 'Die Wächter von Berk' (eps 11-20), 'Auf zu neuen Ufern' (eps 21-57), and 'Die jungen Drachenretter' (eps 1-22, a separate spin-off 'Rescue Riders' series for younger children with different characters). Episode 33 appears twice - the 19-track version contains bonus Trolljäger content and is excluded. The series includes 3 film specials: 'Buch der Drachen', 'Ein Geschenk von Nachtschatten', and 'Das große Drachenrennen'.

splits.reason: These are episodes from 'Dragons: Rescue Riders' (Die jungen Drachenretter), a separate spin-off series for younger children featuring different characters (Schnubbel and Leyla) and a different setting. The albums have 'Das Original-Hörspiel zur Serie' in the title (without 'TV'), released from 2021-2024, distinct from the main 'Dragons' TV series (2014-2019) with 'zur TV-Serie' in titles.

review.notes: The 22 duplicates were caused by merging two different series: 1) Dragons (original TV series: Riders/Defenders of Berk, Race to the Edge) - episodes 1-57 with 'zur TV-Serie' in titles, 2) Dragons: Rescue Riders - episodes 1-22 with 'zur Serie' (no 'TV'). Splitting into two separate series resolves all duplicates. The 3 film specials ('Buch der Drachen', 'Das große Drachenrennen', 'Ein Geschenk von Nachtschatten') correctly remain with the original series as they belong to the main movie franchise. Rescue Riders is a younger-targeted spin-off with different voice cast and storylines that parents would expect to find separately.

split_verdicts.reason: Valid split. Dragons: Rescue Riders (Die jungen Drachenretter) is a separate spin-off series (2021+) targeted at younger children (4-6), with different main characters (Schnubbel & Leyla instead of Hicks/Astrid), different voice actors, and different storytelling approach. These 22 albums appropriately belong in their own series entry. The 3 film specials ('Buch der Drachen', 'Das große Drachenrennen', 'Ein Geschenk von Nachtschatten') correctly remain with the main series as they are part of the original movie franchise.
